_schema: Curated candidate slate for the quadratic vote at /vote. status: 'preview' (page shows but voting is closed) | 'open' (ballots accepted) | 'closed' (results only). Voting is per track - each voter gets 100 voice credits in each track, and giving a candidate N votes costs N-squared credits (max 10 votes on one). Add one entry per person per track as they qualify; handle is the Farcaster handle (no @), used for display, link, and dedupe. Keep the slate honest and small - this is the ballot the api validates against.
